tools.name: search_faq
tools.description:
Search for relevant FAQ answers using semantic similarity.

Use this tool when customers ask questions that may be answered in our FAQ database.
This tool uses AI-powered semantic search to find the most relevant answers,
even if the question wording is different from the stored FAQs.

Best for:
- Natural language questions from customers
- Finding relevant answers when exact topic is unknown
- Complex or nuanced questions

You can optionally filter by topic or adjust the number of results.

tools.name: search_terms
tools.description:
Search Tuio's general insurance terms and conditions documents using semantic similarity.

This searches our public terms and conditions - NOT the user's personal insurance data or policy details.

Use this tool when customers with Tuio insurance ask questions about:
- Coverage terms, limits, or conditions
- Legal terms and policy language
- Exclusions or exceptions
- Claims procedures and requirements
- What is or isn't covered under their policy

Available documents: INQUILINO (tenant insurance), PROPIETARIOS (property owner insurance).

tools.name: get_price_estimate
tools.description:
Generate a price estimate for a home insurance policy. 

IMPORTANT: You must collect ALL required information from the customer before calling this tool:
- Property address (street, city, 5-digit postal code)
- Property size in square meters
- Usage type (renting, owner-occupied, landlord, second home)

Do NOT make up or guess any values. If any information is missing, ask the customer first.
